typography.rules: Use tracking-tight for large headings. Use JetBrains Mono for all balances, crypto addresses, and dice roll results.

visual_enhancers.gradients: Avoid generic linear gradients. Use subtle, large radial gradients for background ambient glows (e.g., behind the hero section or active game).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08) for all cards. Interactive elements should glow on hover.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Deep ambient shadows. Neon glows for active states: box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
visual_enhancers.textures: Incorporate a subtle noise overlay on the main background to prevent the 'digital flat' look.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use backdrop-blur-xl combined with surface_glass background for headers, modals, and floating elements.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8 for standard cards, p-12 for hero sections. Maintain a max-w-7xl constraint for main content.
layouts.grids: Implement the 'Bento Grid' protocol for the Dashboard. Ensure asymmetry and visual tension. Mobile-first stacking.
layouts.containers: Sections should have clear visual separation using subtle background shifts or 1px border lines.

motion.hover: Scale slightly (scale-[1.02]) and increase border opacity. Buttons should have an inner glow effect on hover.
motion.dice_animation: Use CSS keyframes for a 3D tumbling effect, or Framer Motion for rapid value cycling before settling on the final result.
motion.activity_ticker: Implement a vertical or horizontal auto-scrolling feed using Framer Motion or react-fast-marquee. Must feel continuous.
motion.page_transition: Use Framer Motion to fade in and slide up (y: 10 -> 0) new pages.
motion.loading: Use skeleton loaders with a subtle shimmer effect (shimmering gradient matching the dark theme) for data fetching states.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) or moderately rounded (rounded-xl). Primary CTA MUST have a neon glow and bold uppercase text.
components.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5, backdrop-blur-lg, border border-white/10. Hover state: border-white/20.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI customized: bg-[#0a0a0b], border-white/10, text-white, focus:border-emerald-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-emerald-500/50.
components.toasts: Sonner with dark theme, glass background, neon border left (green for success, red for error, cyan for info).
components.badges: Small, pill-shaped, JetBrains Mono font, semi-transparent backgrounds based on status.

specific_pages.landing: Hero section with massive 'Unbounded' typography. 'Play & Earn' primary CTA with intense emerald glow. Ambient radial glow in the background. Live activity ticker prominently displayed.
specific_pages.dashboard: Bento grid layout. Balance card large and visually distinct. Recent games list. Quick actions for deposit/withdraw.
specific_pages.games_hub: Grid of game covers. Hover effects on game cards reveal 'Play Now' button.
specific_pages.dice_game: Large central animated dice display. Betting controls (amount, multiplier) below. Fake live feed of recent rolls specifically for dice.
specific_pages.pvp_cards: Lobby list with glowing active rows. Game board with defined, glowing card slots and WebSocket syncing indicators.
specific_pages.wallet: Prominent QR code display for USDT deposit. Copy-to-clipboard button. Transaction history table with status badges.
specific_pages.referrals: Large referral code block with copy button. Stats grid (Total Referrals, Earnings) using large monospace numbers.
specific_pages.admin: Dense table layout for users and transactions. High contrast text for easy scanning. Action buttons for approvals.

image_urls.description: Dark futuristic metallic grid for hero or dashboard subtle background overlay

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-muted (#94a3b8) is readable against surface (#111113).
accessibility.focus: Clear focus rings on inputs and buttons using focus-visible. Never disable outline without replacing it.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install lucide-react for all icons. NO EMOJIS.
Install react-fast-marquee for the live activity feed if needed.
Use Shadcn UI for structured components, but override default themes to match the deep dark neon aesthetic defined in colors.
Implement a fake live activity feed that updates every few seconds with mock data (e.g., 'User123 won 50 USDT').
Do NOT use generic purple/violet gradients. Stick to Emerald Green, Cyan, and Amber on deep black.
Ensure the Dice Game has a visual animation state when rolling.
Implement PWA support (manifest.json, service worker) as per requirements.
Ensure all components have data-testid attributes for testing.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (transition: all). Always add transitions for specific interactive elements excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container. Do not add `.App { text-align: center; }`.
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations separate good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Components MUST use named exports. Pages MUST use default exports.
Use sonner for toasts, located in /app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx.
